task: I need to send a short note to a coworker about a schedule change, and I want to make sure it includes the key details without getting messy. Can you help me put it together so it’s easy to send?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — I can help with that.

Here’s a clean, short template you can send:

**Hi [Name], just a quick note that our schedule has changed. [Brief detail about the change]. Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks!**

If you want, I can also help you make it:
- more casual
- more professional
- shorter
- tailored to the exact schedule change

If you share the details, I can draft the final version for you.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, close. I need the actual note, not just a template. Keep it short and professional, and make sure it says what changed and when. Something like: schedule moved from 9:00 to 10:30 tomorrow, same location. Just write it clean so I can send it.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a clean version you can send:

Hi [Name], just a quick note that tomorrow’s schedule has been moved from 9:00 to 10:30 at the same location. Please let me know if you have any questions.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Clean and to the point.
